/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ecl_test_threads.dir/threads.cpp.o  -o /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/ecl_threads/ecl_test_threads   -L/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/build/gtest/lib:/home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib ../../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_threads.so -lpthread /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_time.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_exceptions.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_time_lite.so /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_errors.so -lrt -lrt /home/ubuntu/robotics_udacity/p5/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libecl_type_traits.so -pthread
